'''ngavosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:labdacismus|labdacismus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-v-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labdacismus|labdacismus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngavosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngævesheth|ngævesheth]] || [[word:ngæveshej|ngæveshej]] || [[word:ngæveshesh|ngæveshesh]] || [[word:ngæveshe|ngæveshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngavovoshoth|ngavovoshoth]] || [[word:ngavovoshoj|ngavovoshoj]] || [[word:ngavovoshosh|ngavovoshosh]] || [[word:ngavovosho|ngavovosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngavoshoth|ngavoshoth]] || [[word:ngavoshoj|ngavoshoj]] || [[word:ngavoshosh|ngavoshosh]] || [[word:ngavosho|ngavosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngavofshoth|ngavofshoth]] || [[word:ngavofshoj|ngavofshoj]] || [[word:ngavofshosh|ngavofshosh]] || [[word:ngavofshof|ngavofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngavoshotho|ngavoshotho]] || [[word:ngavoshojo|ngavoshojo]] || [[word:ngavoshosho|ngavoshosho]] || [[word:ngavoshoko|ngavoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngavoshoth|ngavoshoth]] || [[word:ngavoshoj|ngavoshoj]] || [[word:ngavoshosh|ngavoshosh]] || [[word:ngavosho|ngavosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngavoshothol|ngavoshothol]] || [[word:ngavoshojol|ngavoshojol]] || [[word:ngavoshoshol|ngavoshoshol]] || [[word:ngavoshokol|ngavoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngavoshothotho|ngavoshothotho]] || [[word:ngavoshojojo|ngavoshojojo]] || [[word:ngavoshoshosho|ngavoshoshosho]] || [[word:ngavoshoko|ngavoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngavoshothon|ngavoshothon]] || [[word:ngavoshojon|ngavoshojon]] || [[word:ngavoshoshon|ngavoshoshon]] || [[word:ngavoshokon|ngavoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngavoshothoro|ngavoshothoro]] || [[word:ngavoshojoro|ngavoshojoro]] || [[word:ngavoshoshoro|ngavoshoshoro]] || [[word:ngavoshokoro|ngavoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
